title: MCA, NFRA, aur ICAI ki Nayi Audit Standards Par Deliberations
content:
# MCA, NFRA, aur ICAI ki Nayi Audit Standards Par Deliberations

Ek important update hai! Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) ne National Financial Reporting Authority (NFRA) aur Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ke saath naye audit standards par deliberations ki hain, jismein major changes expect kiye ja rahe hain.

MCA Indian audit rules ko global benchmarks ke saath align karne ke liye ek naya audit regime finalize karne ki disha mein kaam kar raha hai. Recent discussions mein lagbhag 40 auditing standards shamil the, jinmein Standards on Auditing (SAs) aur Standards on Quality Management (SQMs) dono discuss hue.

Yahaan kuch key points hain:

*   **Audit Standards Par Deliberations:** Ministry of Corporate Affairs ne haal hi mein NFRA aur ICAI ke senior functionaries ke saath meeting ki thi, jismein naye audit standards ko notify karne se pehle unpar vichaar-vimarsh kiya gaya.
*   **SA 600 Par Matbhed:** Standard on Auditing (SA) 600, jo group financial statements ke liye principal auditor ki responsibility se deal karta hai, uspar ICAI aur NFRA ke beech disagreements hain. NFRA International Standard on Auditing (ISA) 600 jaisa approach chahta hai, jismein principal auditor par comprehensive liability hoti hai, jabki ICAI ne iska virodh kiya hai.
*   **SQM 1 aur SQM 2 ka Deferment:** ICAI Council ne apni 451st Meeting (March 30 aur 31, 2026 ko hui) mein Standards on Quality Management (SQM) 1 aur SQM 2 ki mandatory effective date ko aage badhaane ka decision liya hai.
*   **Existing SQC 1 Continues:** Yeh SQMs, jo pehle April 1, 2026 se existing Standard on Quality Control (SQC) 1 ko replace karne wale the, ab 'further announcement' tak lagu nahin honge. Tab tak, extant SQC 1 hi applicable rahega.
*   **Regulatory Tussle:** SQMs ke deferment ka ek bada reason NFRA aur ICAI ke beech quality management standards ko notify karne ki authority par chal raha disagreement hai.

Government, Companies Act ke तहत audit standards ko notify karne ki sole aur final authority hai. MCA in divergent views ko resolve karne mein ek crucial role play kar raha hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=19803)

*Published on: 4 April 2026*
